programme.title: A Royal Christmas
programme.desc: Prince Leopold, heir to the throne of Cordinia, falls in love with Emily Taylor, a humble seamstress from Philadelphia. But the young prince's wishes are challenged by his mother, who wants him to marry royalty.

programme.title: Love at First Dance
programme.desc: Hope is tasked with teaching Manhattan's former "Most Eligible Bachelor" how to dance for his extravagant, society wedding. But as the dance lessons progress, complications ensue when feelings begin to develop between them.

programme.title: A Harvest Wedding
programme.desc: Sarah, a wedding planner in New York, is hired to plan the most anticipated wedding of the season. But the bride wants the wedding to be on the family farm which is now being run by her older brother who happens to be Sarah's ex.

programme.title: At Home in Mitford
programme.desc: With a case of writer's block, a children's author escapes to small town Mitford for a change of scenery. She soon finds the heart and soul of the southern town in a priest as they work together to care for a young boy.

programme.title: One Winter Weekend
programme.desc: Cara, a magazine writer, who gets burned by her boyfriend on New Years' Eve, decides to go on a dating detox. Challenged by her employer to write about it, she hopes a ski getaway with her best friend will spark inspiration.

programme.title: Frozen in Love
programme.desc: When struggling bookstore owner Mary and the bad boy of professional hockey, Adam, are teamed together to help facilitate an image makeover for the other, they soon realize that opposites attract.

programme.title: Royal Hearts
programme.desc: Montana rancher Hank learns he's the last heir of the late King of Merania and has inherited the throne. His daughter convinces the reluctant royal to step in as King so the country can keep its independence.

programme.title: Harvest Love
programme.desc: A widowed surgeon visits her family's pear orchard in hopes of reconnecting with her distant son. She starts to fall for the farm manager, Will, who is growing a new hybrid pear, and teaches her the importance of her heritage.

programme.title: Campfire Kiss
programme.desc: Feeling disconnected with her son, Dana decides to take him camping. As soon as she arrives, Dana starts butting heads with her cabin neighbor, Steve, a single father and outdoorsman who trying to connect with his daughter.

programme.title: Sun, Sand & Romance
programme.desc: Kate is a driven publishing exec visiting a summer resort with her boyfriend Eric. There she runs into Shep, an old high school friend and fellow camp counselor, who is now the Activities Director.

programme.title: Groundswell
programme.desc: On the heels of a personal and professional setback, Chef Emma travels to Hawaii where she meets Ben, a handsome, reclusive surf instructor whose lessons help her to regain her footing. Starring Lacey Chabert, Ektor Rivera.

programme.title: In My Dreams
programme.desc: Natalie and Nick have no luck in romance. After tossing coins into a fountain, the two then begin dreaming about each other. But, according to fountain mythology, they only have a week to turn those dreams into reality.

programme.title: My Favorite Wedding
programme.desc: Tess, is going to Chicago for the weekend to be the maid of honor at her best friend's wedding. Her boyfriend, Dex, backs out of the trip at the last minute, leaving Tess in the hands of the groom's best man, Michael.

programme.title: Autumn Dreams
programme.desc: A young couple's spur of the moment marriage is immediately annulled by the bride's parents. Years later, they discover that a glitch in the paperwork means they are still husband and wife.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mysteries: Pilot
programme.desc: Jennifer loves scouring garage sales to look for items to sell in her resell shop, but realizes a series of burglaries and a friend's murder may have a connection to the sales.

programme.title: Birthday Wish
programme.desc: A woman expecting to get engaged on her all-important 30th birthday gets a different surprise after she makes her birthday wish: a glimpse into her future - which doesn't resemble anything she's ever imagined for herself.

programme.title: Love on the Menu
programme.desc: A chef makes a deal with a frozen food executive in order to save his restaurant. Stars Autumn Reeser, Kavan Smith, Barbara Niven.

programme.title: My Summer Prince
programme.desc: When a prince finds himself in some hot water for his partying ways, the royal family hires a PR consultant. But when she falls ill, her assistant steps in to take control of the campaign and possibly the prince's heart.

programme.title: Love on Safari
programme.desc: After Kira inherits a wildlife reserve in South Africa, she travels there to meet the no-nonsense head ranger, Tom. He urges her to take a safari in hopes that she will fall in love with the land, the animals, and hopefully him.

programme.title: Valentine Ever After
programme.desc: Big city girls Julia and her best friend Sydney take a trip to a dude ranch in Wyoming for a fun weekend getaway, but after a brawl at the local bar, the girls are sentenced to stay in town and perform community service.

programme.title: The Perfect Setting
programme.desc: An aspiring jewelry designer returns to Belgium to visit her grandfather and hopefully win the Valentines Day Diamond Contest. Stars Laci J. Mailey, David Elsendoorn.

programme.title: Love, Romance & Chocolate
programme.desc: Emma and chocolatier Luc compete for Belgium's Royal Chocolatier. The beauty and romance of Bruges inspire unique chocolate combinations, but will their entry win without them losing their hearts? Stars Lacey Chabert, Will Kemp.

programme.title: The Wedding Veil
programme.desc: After discovering a long-lost painting, museum curator Avery and new board member Peter investigate the artwork's origins as they plan a gala to unveil it. Stars Lacey Chabert, Kevin McGarry, Autumn Reeser, Alison Sweeney.

programme.title: Romance at Hope Ranch
programme.desc: Hope Morgan sets out to begin a new chapter of her life—fulfilling her childhood dream of running a ranch in the picturesque town of Ruidoso, New Mexico and reviving the beloved Giddy Up Gala. Stars Alison Sweeney, Gabriel Hogan.

programme.title: Paris, Wine & Romance
programme.desc: Isabella travels to Paris to compete in a major wine competition. While there she meets, Jacque, a competitor who shows her the city of love and teaches her about how wine is more than just a business. Jen Lilley, Dan Jeannotte.

programme.title: A Little Daytime Drama
programme.desc: In order to save her daytime soap drama from cancellation, head writer Maggie must convince Darin, fan favorite actor and her real-life ex-boyfriend, to return to the show. Stars Jen Lilley, Ryan Paevey, Linda Dano.

programme.title: Appetite for Love
programme.desc: Mina has everything going for her, but her world is suddenly turned upside down when work sends her to her hometown in Tennessee to convince an old, stubborn restaurant owner to sell his property.

programme.title: The Perfect Catch
programme.desc: When her high school boyfriend, a superstar baseball player, returns to town, a single-parent finds the inspiration to reinvent her struggling diner... and revisits the past to find something even better for the future.

programme.title: Home Turf
programme.desc: Cassidy is the president of a small college whose life is thrown for a loop when freshmen on the football team move into her home. Can Logan, the handsome coach, help smooth things over? Stars Nikki DeLoach, Warren Christie.

programme.title: Autumn Dreams
programme.desc: A young couple's spur of the moment marriage is immediately annulled by the bride's parents. Years later, they discover that a glitch in the paperwork means they are still husband and wife.

programme.title: Hearts of Winter
programme.desc: An interior designer brings new life to the house of a widower and his daughter and finds love in the process. Stars Jill Wagner, Victor Webster, Rukiya Bernard.

programme.title: Love on the Slopes
programme.desc: NYC-based editor, Alex, is sent to an extreme sports outpost, to write a story. At first, she fails at everything, much to the chagrin of Cole, an extreme sports enthusiast who thinks this city girl should head back to New York.

programme.title: The Story of Us
programme.desc: Jamie learns that her first love Sawyer is the architect of a development that wants to change her beloved neighborhood and threatens her bookstore. Can old Valentines help them see eye to eye? Starring Maggie Lawson and Sam Page.

programme.title: Love on the Danube: Love Song
programme.desc: Fellow cruise passengers, Sarah and Jack, play matchmaker with their music loving widowed parents, as they cruise down the Danube visiting European cities. Stars Nazneen Contractor, Wes Brown, Kathryn Drysdale, Catherine Disher.

programme.title: Royal Matchmaker
programme.desc: A NYC matchmaker is hired by a king to find his son a suitable wife in time for a celebration. As the clock ticks towards the deadline, he finds him the perfect wife, only to realize that she's fallen in love with him.

programme.title: Bridal Wave
programme.desc: A soon-to-be bride is planning her dream wedding to a well-off doctor at a beautiful resort. Although his family doesn't care much for her, she's trying to make the most of the situation.

programme.title: Roadhouse Romance
programme.desc: Country music fan Callie is determined to continue her late grandfather's legacy. While TV director Luke is in town, he teaches her that sometimes it's best to look forward instead of back. Stars Lauren Alaina and Tyler Hynes.

programme.title: October Kiss
programme.desc: A free-spirited young woman is hired by a career-driven single dad as a temporary nanny for his two young children. As Halloween approaches she finds herself also becoming drawn to their dad. Stars Ashley Williams and Sam Jaeger.

programme.title: Haunted Wedding
programme.desc: Jana and Brian's plan to wed is in jeopardy when Angelique, a ghost in an 18th century wedding dress, vows to stop it. The couple must work together to save their wedding from disaster. Stars Janel Parrish, Dominic Sherwood.

programme.title: A Valentine's Match
programme.desc: Fired from her job as a reality TV host, Natalie returns home for Valentine's Day, only to find herself running the town festival's auction with her ex-fiance thanks to two scheming mothers. Bethany Joy Lenz, Luke Macfarlane.

programme.title: 'Twas the Date Before Christmas
programme.desc: Feeling the pressure to bring someone home for Christmas, Jessie convinces Bryan to join her family for a day filled with holiday events, only the family doesn't know it's their first date. Stars Robert Buckley, Amy Groening.

programme.title: An Unexpected Christmas
programme.desc: A speech writer makes a deal with his ex-girlfriend to pretend they're a couple to save his family's Christmas. It's not long before both the ruse and their feelings catch up with them. Stars Bethany Joy Lenz, Tyler Hynes.

programme.title: Christmas Above the Clouds
programme.desc: Eager to avoid Christmas, Ella Neezer, a CEO, books an international trip that skips the holiday, until three spirits journey Ella through her life to rediscover her Christmas spirit. Erin Krakow, Tyler Hynes.

programme.title: Next Stop, Christmas
programme.desc: Angie is determined to spend Christmas alone but her usual commuter ride turns into a Christmas train that drops her off in her home town in 2011. Stars Lyndsy Fonseca, Chandler Massey, Lea Thompson, and Christopher Lloyd.

programme.title: Christmas with a Kiss
programme.desc: A woman returns home to help with her family's Christmas Carnival and romance ignites. A photo journalist curates a surprise reunion. Starring Mishael Morgan, Ronnie Rowe Jr. and Jaime M Callica.

programme.title: My Norwegian Holiday
programme.desc: Dealing with her grandma's death, JJ seeks dissertation inspiration. Henrik, drawn to her troll figurine, invites her to Bergen, Norway, to trace its origins. Starring Rhiannon Fish and David Elsendoorn.

programme.title: Christmas with the Singhs
programme.desc: Newly engaged Asha Singh and Jake O'Brien are excited to spend Christmas together, but their relationship is tested when their families' cultural and holiday traditions clash. Stars Anuja Joshi, Benjamin Hollingsworth.

programme.title: Write Before Christmas
programme.desc: Jessica sends Christmas cards to those special to her- the aunt who raised her, her brother, an aging popstar, the teacher that inspired her, and her friend that always tells the truth. Stars Torrey DeVitto, Chad Michael Murray.

programme.title: An Alpine Holiday
programme.desc: Two vastly different sisters follow their late grandparent's steps and experience everything the Alps has to offer- including romance. Starring Ashley Williams, Laci J. Mailey, and Julien Samani.

programme.title: Jingle Bell Run
programme.desc: Self-described bookworm Avery is paired with retired hockey star Wes to compete in a holiday race across America. The team struggles through themed challenges until romance runs its course. Stars Ashley Williams, Andrew Walker.

programme.title: The Christmas Baby
programme.desc: A couple is surprised when a baby is mysteriously dropped off on their doorstep, forcing them to navigate a new terrain in their relationship and careers. Stars Ali Liebert , Katherine Barrell, and Barbara Niven.

programme.title: A Keller Christmas Vacation
programme.desc: Siblings Dylan, Cal, and Emory are at a crossroads in their lives and have drifted apart. To help, their parents plan a family Christmas river cruise visiting Germany and Austria. Stars Jonathan Bennett, Brandon Routh, Eden Sher.

programme.title: The Search for Mr. Christmas
programme.desc: Host Jonathan Bennett and judge Melissa Peterman kick off the hunt for Hallmark's next leading man as ten new hunks reinvent Santa, then brave a ski-slope meet-cute with Janel Parrish- where spills steal the scene.

programme.title: Unwrapping Christmas: Tina's Miracle
programme.desc: Successful gift-wrapping shop owner Tina is in charge of planning this year's annual Christmas gala. But things begin to go awry when the gala faces cancellation due to a scrooge-like estate owner. Stars Natalie Hall, Alec Santos.

programme.title: A Very Merry Bridesmaid
programme.desc: Leah's 30th birthday is on Christmas Eve, the same day as her brother's wedding. Her childhood crush is back in town for the wedding and he is determined to make sure her birthday is celebrated. Stars Emily Osment, Casey Deidrick.

programme.title: One Royal Holiday
programme.desc: When Anna offers a stranded mother and son shelter in a blizzard, she learns that they are the Royal Family of Galwick. Anna shows the Prince how they do Christmas in her hometown of Kentsbury. Stars Laura Osnes and Aaron Tveit.

programme.title: Time for Us to Come Home for Christmas
programme.desc: Five guests are mysteriously invited to an inn to celebrate Christmas. With the help of the owner Ben, Sarah discovers that an event from the past may connect them and change their lives forever. Lacey Chabert, Stephen Huszar.

programme.title: Time for Him to Come Home for Christmas
programme.desc: Four days before Christmas, Elizabeth receives a voicemail from a number she doesn't recognize. On the message, a man she doesn't know makes one final plea to the love of his life. Holland Roden, Tyler Hynes, Tenille Townes.

programme.title: Holiday Touchdown: A Bills Love Story (Extended Cut)
programme.desc: Lifelong Bills fans Morgan and Gabe find love in Buffalo at Christmas. Holland Roden, Matthew Daddario, and Joe Pantoliano.

programme.title: Christmas Under Wraps
programme.desc: With a residency at a top hospital and a boyfriend she adores, Lauren appears to have her entire life figured out. But when she loses both her job and her beau on the same day, Lauren reluctantly accepts a position in Alaska.

programme.title: Hailey Dean Mysteries: Dating is Murder
programme.desc: Attorney turned therapist Hailey Dean is pulled into another investigation when a popular new dating app links multiple missing persons cases from around the city. Stars Kellie Martin.

programme.title: Emma Fielding Mysteries: Site Unseen
programme.desc: A dedicated archaeologist gets involved in a murder investigation when she and her students unearth a dead body while searching for evidence of a 17th-century coastal Maine settlement. Stars Courtney Thorne-Smith and James Tupper.

programme.title: Emma Fielding Mysteries: Past Malice
programme.desc: When Emma Fielding is recruited to aid in a groundbreaking discovery beneath the Chandler Castle, she is swept into another mystery when she finds her colleague murdered in the crypts. Stars Courtney Thorne Smith, James Tupper.

programme.title: Emma Fielding Mysteries: More Bitter than Death
programme.desc: After a friend and head of the National Archaeological Society meets an untimely death, Emma and Agent Conner find themselves questioning her colleagues' motives. Stars Courtney Thorne-Smith, James Tupper.

programme.title: Ruby Herring Mysteries: Silent Witness
programme.desc: When consumer reporter, Ruby Herring stumbles onto a murder, the spunky redhead discovers a knack for crime solving. With the help of a handsome detective, Ruby finds a new career covering crime. Stars Taylor Cole, Stephen Huszar.

programme.title: Ruby Herring Mysteries: Her Last Breath
programme.desc: Ruby and Detective Killian investigate a suspicious fatal car accident. With their yin and yang relationship, they solve the case, until Ruby finds new evidence that they may have it all wrong. Stars Taylor Cole, Stephen Huszar.

programme.title: Ruby Herring Mysteries: Prediction Murder
programme.desc: When crime reporter Ruby Herring receives clues to a murder that happened five years earlier involving a local psychic, she joins forces with Detective Jake Killian to help crack the case. Stars Taylor Cole, Stephen Huszar.

programme.title: Darrow & Darrow Pilot
programme.desc: Claire Darrow, a lawyer, fights for what's right, regardless of whether it makes her a dime. Joanna, Claire's estranged mother and a lawyer as well, would rather make a profit. They clash on nearly everything.

programme.title: Chronicle Mysteries: Recovered
programme.desc: Alex McPherson launches a podcast with a cold case from her past. With the help of local reporter, Drew Godfrey, new mysteries mix with old as the two work to recover what's been lost. Starring Alison Sweeney and Benjamin Ayres.

programme.title: Picture Perfect Mysteries: Newlywed and Dead
programme.desc: Photographer Allie Adams is shocked when the groom at a wedding she is covering is shot dead. What's even worse, is she must convince Detective Sam Acosta that her brother isn't the killer. Stars Alexa PenaVega, Carlos PenaVega.

programme.title: Picture Perfect Mysteries: Dead Over Diamonds
programme.desc: Photographer Allie and Detective Sam's investigation into a priceless stolen necklace leads to danger and an unexpected death. Stars Alexa & Carlos PenaVega, Erik Estrada.

programme.title: Picture Perfect Mysteries: Exit Stage Death
programme.desc: Allie and Sam navigate the world of amateur theatrics as they pursue the killer of an actress. Their largest obstacle is trying to assess whether the cast members are lying or telling the truth. Starring Alexa & Carlos PenaVega.

programme.title: Nikki & Nora: Sister Sleuths
programme.desc: Fraternal twins Nikki and Nora are forced back into each other's lives when they inherit a detective agency. As they solve a murder, they realize their differences may be their greatest advantage. Stars Hunter King, Rhiannon Fish.

programme.title: MatchMaker Mysteries: A Killer Engagement
programme.desc: When a woman is murdered, and her fiance is the prime suspect, successful matchmaker Angie works to prove her client's innocence, much to the dismay of Kyle, the detective working the case. Stars Danica McKellar, Victor Webster.

programme.title: MatchMaker Mysteries: A Fatal Romance
programme.desc: When a romance writer is murdered, matchmaker Angie Dove gets entangled in another case…and with Detective Kyle Carter. Can they read between the lines to find the murderer? Stars Danica McKellar, Victor Webster, Bruce Boxleitner.

programme.title: MatchMaker Mysteries: The Art of the Kill
programme.desc: Angie Dove gets Det. Carter's attention by stumbling on a murder at an art museum. Angie's father Nick is on his own case, trying to solve a series of petty thefts at the museum. Danica McKellar, Victor Webster, Bruce Boxleitner.

programme.title: Crossword Mysteries: A Puzzle to Die For
programme.desc: After several of her puzzles are linked to the murder of an art gallery owner, a crossword puzzle editor teams up with a no nonsense detective to stop a killer in their midst. Stars Lacey Chabert, Brennan Elliott.

programme.title: Crossword Mysteries: Proposing Murder
programme.desc: Tess dives into Logan's murder investigation of her friend who was about to propose with her help. As she grows closer to the truth, she fears it could ruin everyone's happily ever after. Starring Lacey Chabert, Brennan Elliott.

programme.title: Crossword Mysteries: Abracadaver
programme.desc: During her birthday celebration, Tess and Logan find themselves swept up in a world that isn't always what it seems when the headlining magician at the Magic Manor winds up dead. Starring Lacey Chabert, Brennan Elliott.

programme.title: Crossword Mysteries: Terminal Descent
programme.desc: When Tess prepares for a crossword challenge against a super computer, the engineer behind it is murdered, spurring her and Logan to seek answers before they become the next victims. Starring Lacey Chabert and Brennan Elliott.
